steps.speaker: Silas
lines: Watch it, kid! I'm on a schedule.
Don't look at me like that — this gold is insured! Insurance is the real thief here!
(Silas flees. A metallic clink echoes as he drops something on the ground.)

steps.speaker: Bank Owner
lines: Sighs... This town needs a Sheriff with some grit. Our current one is half-blind.
Is that his iron? Pick it up, kid. If you're going to the Old Mine to get that gold back, you'll need more than luck.
